positive: An elegant, stylized celestial fox (kitsune) silhouette leaping amongst stylized crescent moons and stars. The fox has a majestic, flowing tail and sharp, graceful lines. Composition should be central, filling the frame with negative space. Use a high-contrast, minimalist art style with bold outlines. Color direction: Deep midnight blues, metallic gold accents, and crisp white luminescence. Suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Style: Modern tattoo ink and Japanese woodblock print fusion. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting to emphasize silhouette. Clean vector art aesthetic.
negative: blur, low resolution, fuzzy, signature, watermark, text, logo, trademark, grain, noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, busy, copyrighted, graffiti
